title: sida tracyi
intro: Sida tracyi, also known as Tracy's fanpetals, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sida tracyi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Sida tracyi is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
